creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

It's entangled. Both ports should be needed in sync, but with different maintainers.
Moreover, for users of graphics/nvidia-drm-*-kmod, it should be in sync, but another maintainer, ashafer.

As ashafer wrote at Forums [1], he would be working on how to handle distfiles once 550 or later series of driver becomes production.

[1] https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/call-for-testing-nvidia-drm-kernel-module.87161/page-3#post-643094
